title: tabplay~
description: play a table as a sample (non-transposing)

messages.description: sets starting sample and plays the sample
1st element sets starting sample and 2nd element sets duration in samples
bang when finished playing the table

arguments.description: sets table name with the sample

methods.description: set the table with the sample

body: The tabplay~ object plays a sample, or part of one, with no transposition or interpolation. It is cheaper than tabread4~ and there are none of tabread4~'s interpolation artifacts.
